2026-01-30
Committee report approving bill, renumbered as HF 2228.

2026-01-30

Introduced
2026-01-30
Subcommittee: Meggers, Behn and Cooling. H.J. 190.

Introduced
2026-01-30
Subcommittee: Young, Madison and Williams. H.J. 191.

A bill for an act relating to the driving privileges of persons under the age of eighteen who were previously issued a special minor's restricted license that was subsequently suspended, and including applicability provisions.
Introduced
2026-01-30
Subcommittee: Jones, Bossman and Wilson. H.J. 191.


HF 2217
A bill for an act relating to radon testing in schools, including responsibilities of nonpublic schools, applicability to charter and innovation zone schools, establishing a school testing and mitigation of radon grant program within the department of education, making appropriations, and including effective date provisions.
Introduced
2026-01-30

HF 2218
A bill for an act relating to video recording systems in special education classrooms.
Introduced
2026-01-30

HF 2220

Introduced
2026-01-30
Introduced, referred to Health and Human Services. H.J. 185.


HF 2221
A bill for an act modifying eligibility and participation requirements for the state child care assistance program.
Introduced
2026-01-30
Introduced, referred to Health and Human Services. H.J. 185.

Introduced
2026-01-30
Introduced, referred to Public Safety. H.J. 185.


HF 2223

2026-01-30

HF 2224
A bill for an act relating to property assessment standards and litigation.
Introduced
2026-01-30

Introduced
2026-01-30
Introduced, placed on calendar. H.J. 186.


HF 2228

Introduced
2026-01-30

2026-01-30
